'''BolBol''' was the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] in charge of the [[Stenness Node|Stenness System]]. He occasionally worked with [[Mageye]] the Hutt and the [[Thig Brothers]].

{{Char-stub}}
